publicationPolicy: Only explicitly PUBLIC_SAFE summaries are included. Raw messages, attachments, addresses, people, customers, vendors, employees, employers, programs, drawings, pricing, and production data are excluded.

items.title: Blanking-feed automation planning
items.summary: A controlled reconstruction covering sequence definition, material handling, sensor logic, guarding questions, installation gates, and measurable production criteria without employer, vendor, part, or plant identifiers.
items.boundary: Reconstruction only; no proprietary source drawings, programs, production values, vendor identity, or safety certification.
unresolvedQuestions: Locate independent source records and confirm dates before upgrading the classification.

items.title: Robot-tended lathe workflow
items.summary: A public-safe reconstruction of part presentation, gripper and chuck interface questions, machine signals, probing, exception handling, queue control, and decision criteria.
items.boundary: No machine serials, proprietary programs, part identities, videos, cycle data, or vendor-specific controls are published.
unresolvedQuestions: Confirm the exact machine model and source chronology privately before upgrading the classification.

items.title: CNC and CAD/CAM standardization
items.summary: Long-term experience implementing CNC programming standards, CAD/CAM workflows, posts, tool libraries, feeds and speeds, troubleshooting, quoting, and repeatable output controls.
items.boundary: Public wording remains non-quantified until program-count and output claims are independently corroborated.
unresolvedQuestions: Do not publish a 25,000-plus program count unless a defensible count and methodology are documented.

items.title: Kitchen planning and sequence
items.summary: A public-safe planning example covering use zones, fixed constraints, measurements, material decisions, and the order in which owner choices should be resolved.
items.boundary: Demonstration structure only; not a permit, code, electrical, plumbing, or construction drawing.

items.title: Garage flow and zone planning
items.summary: A 28-by-40-foot garage example showing protected vehicle lanes, workbench and tool zones, fixed-obstacle checks, missing measurements, and phased setup actions.
items.boundary: Hypothetical demonstration; not customer work, permit drawings, engineering, or field-verified dimensions.

items.title: Small-business lead-to-job control
items.summary: A seven-status owner-controlled workflow connecting intake, missing information, quote review, scheduling, completion, and follow-up without automatic customer sends.
items.boundary: Synthetic records only; no real customer or communication data.
